data.body: origin/main advanced 2 commits: (1) de-flake of three merge-gating tests (should fix my CI flakes), (2) ADR 0047 RETIRES the auto-lander -> new landing = plain Gerrit Submit once LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 (main moving FFO->Rebase-If-Necessary; Gerrit rebases server-side; textual conflict -> manual rebase+repush). Rebased 6-stack onto new tip (clean, no conflicts), picking up the de-flake. lint/config/previously-flaky-tests all green locally. Re-pushing; will land via Submit (not the retired land tool) once green.
